title: Hushed running pnpm check for session-handoff
body: Hushed Fading Hush (codex/GPT-5/019e5a) is running the mandatory session-handoff pnpm check on branch feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs at HEAD bf3a8152. Earlier pnpm agent-tools wrappers hit the non-TTY modules-purge prompt, so this run uses CI=true to allow pnpm's dependency-state repair path if required. Result will be broadcast.
